title: Pepe El Toro
writer: Carlos Orellana, Ismael Rodríguez, Pedro de Urdimalas
actors: Pedro Infante, Evita Muñoz 'Chachita', Amanda del Llano
plot: Pepe el Toro becomes a boxer and accidentally kills his best friend during a semi-final match. Channeling his anger and frustration, Pepe goes on to win the championship while beginning close friends with his friend's widower. The...
